case_title: BENTON, FLETCHER CHAPMEN II VS HAY, BARRY DEREK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY BENTON, FLETCHER CHAPMEN II AS TO DEFENDANT HAY, BARRY DEREK GENERAL CRATING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAY, BARRY DEREK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENTON, FLETCHER CHAPMEN II IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAY, BARRY DEREK GENERAL CRATING IT APPEARS THAT THE INADEQUATE PACKAGING SUUPORT FOR THE SCULPTURE OCCURRED PRIOR TO THE CRATING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
